notes: Discipline of modeling and predicting system resource needs; trending, simulation, analytic queueing-theory models; practiced via BMC, TeamQuest, Metron, CA; embedded in modern cloud cost/capacity tooling
Reduction of physical server sprawl via consolidation and virtualization; VMware ESX 2001, Xen 2003, Hyper-V 2008; transitional paradigm before cloud migration
Management discipline of tying IT spend and service levels to business priorities; ITIL, Balanced Scorecard, Val IT, TBM; evergreen board-level concern
TeamQuest Analyzer, Reporter, Model, View; capacity-planning and performance-monitoring suite; acquired by Helpsystems 2018, folded into Fortra 2022
